MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-03-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Nicole Olcomendy, Reporter Beldon Yee.

In camera hearing held with plaintiff's counsel, Gregory Haines and plaintiff Michael Henderson regarding motion to withdraw as counsel. Having heard arguments, the court granted the motion to withdraw and ordered Gregory Haines to prepare the order.

In open court, the court granted a continuance for two weeks until June 17, 2002 for status conference. At which time plaintiff is to inform the court regarding status of counsel.
